input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 12 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "general", "count": 4, "message": "4 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 3, "message": "3 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 480, "current_utilization": 20, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General has 12 incoming patients. Activate the crisis team for 3 mental health patients and monitor the trend of 4 general patients. Capacity is stable for the next 2 hours, with no diversion recommended at this time.
